## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] I ran `pytest` and tests pass
- [ ] I added/updated tests where it made sense
- [ ] I updated documentation (`README.md`, `docs/`) if behavior or config changed
- [ ] For web changes: `npm run lint` and `npm run build` pass
- [ ] My changes follow [RESPONSIBLE_USE.md](../RESPONSIBLE_USE.md)

## How to Test

Steps for a reviewer to verify the change.

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know (trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots).
